arts.ttl: Morgan Whittaker advice as Middlesbrough man prepares for emotional Plymouth Argyle reunion
arts.sum: Michael Carrick says Morgan Whittaker must be cold about his emotions and feelings towards Plymouth Argyle and head coach Miron Muslic in order to have the best possible opportunity of performing well on Friday. Whittaker joined Boro from Plymouth in January in a £6 million deal but it was not without some controversy.

arts.ttl: 'Let's have a right go' - Middlesbrough's rival bosses on the Championship play-off race - Teesside Live
arts.sum: “We’ve still got really important games coming up and I think now we just need to put all our attention and try to win the game against Blackburn. There will be just two games and six points left to play for by that point, meaning this weekend could quite literally make or break Boro’s season.

arts.ttl: James Wilson and fellow Scotland starlet pen new Hearts contracts
arts.sum: Jambos boss Critchley said: “It’s great news that both James and Adam have committed their futures to the club. Rising Scotland stars James Wilson and Adam Forrester have both signed new contracts with Hearts .

arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle and Sheffield United are charged with misconduct after a fracas following their Championship game on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick makes 'miracle' point and issues defiant 'game on' Middlesbrough play-off plea
arts.sum: They now face two crucial games over the Easter weekend, with Plymouth Argyle visiting the Riverside on Good Friday, before a trip to Sheffield Wednesday on Easter Monday. Michael Carrick insists Middlesbrough don’t need an Easter miracle to qualify for this season’s play-offs, but understands this weekend could be vital in shaping the final league table.
